name: hugegraph-deepwiki-skill
description: DeepWiki-backed Q&A skill for Apache HugeGraph.

interface.longDescription: Provides a repository-grounded Apache HugeGraph Q&A skill that forwards architecture, API, configuration, storage, traversal, schema, and implementation questions to the official DeepWiki MCP wiki.
defaultPrompt: Use $hugegraph-deepwiki-skill to answer my HugeGraph question.
